---
title: "rkagi Quickstart Guide"
author: "Rainer Krug"
format: html
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{rkagi Quickstart Guide}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---
# rkagi: R Client for Kagi APIs

## Installation

```r
if (requireNamespace("remotes", quietly = TRUE) == FALSE) {
  install.packages("remotes")
}
remotes::install_github("rkrug/rkagi")
```

## Getting a Kagi API key

Store your API key securely (recommended) with `keyring`:

```r
keyring::key_set("API_kagi")
```

Then create a reusable `rkagi` connection:

```r
library(rkagi)

conn <- kagi_connection(
  api_key = function() keyring::key_get("API_kagi")
)
```

## Package design

`rkagi` follows a simple three-step workflow:

1. Build endpoint-specific query objects:
   `search_query()`, `enrich_web_query()`, `enrich_news_query()`, `summarize_query()`.
2. Create one connection with `kagi_connection()`.
3. Execute with `kagi_request()` to write JSON responses to disk.

This design makes batch runs reproducible and easy to persist.

## Build and inspect a search query

```r
q <- search_query(
  query    = 'biodiversity "annual report"',
  filetype = c("pdf", "docx"),
  site     = c("example.com", "gov"),
  inurl    = c("2024", "report"),
  intitle  = "summary",
  expand   = FALSE
)

q

# Optional: open the query in your browser
open_search_query(q)
```

## Search API

```r
out_search <- tempfile("rkagi-search-")
dir.create(out_search, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

kagi_request(
  connection = conn,
  query = q,
  limit = 5,
  output = out_search,
  overwrite = TRUE
)

list.files(out_search, pattern = "\\.json$", full.names = TRUE)
```

## Enrich API

Web enrich:

```r
q_web <- enrich_web_query("open data portals", site = "gov", expand = FALSE)

out_web <- tempfile("rkagi-enrich-web-")
dir.create(out_web, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

kagi_request(
  connection = conn,
  query = q_web,
  limit = 5,
  output = out_web,
  overwrite = TRUE
)
```

News enrich:

```r
q_news <- enrich_news_query("biodiversity policy", expand = FALSE)

out_news <- tempfile("rkagi-enrich-news-")
dir.create(out_news, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

kagi_request(
  connection = conn,
  query = q_news,
  limit = 5,
  output = out_news,
  overwrite = TRUE
)
```

## Universal Summarizer

URL mode:

```r
q_sum_url <- summarize_query(
  url = "https://www.example.com/long-article",
  engine = "muriel",
  summary_type = "summary",
  target_language = "EN"
)

out_sum_url <- tempfile("rkagi-summarize-url-")
dir.create(out_sum_url, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

kagi_request(
  connection = conn,
  query = q_sum_url,
  output = out_sum_url,
  overwrite = TRUE
)
```

Text mode:

```r
q_sum_text <- summarize_query(
  text = "Paste long text here ...",
  engine = "cecil",
  summary_type = "takeaway",
  target_language = "EN",
  cache = FALSE
)

out_sum_text <- tempfile("rkagi-summarize-text-")
dir.create(out_sum_text, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

kagi_request(
  connection = conn,
  query = q_sum_text,
  output = out_sum_text,
  overwrite = TRUE
)
```

## Convert JSON output to parquet

```r
parquet_dir <- tempfile("rkagi-parquet-")

kagi_request_parquet(
  input_json = out_search,
  output = parquet_dir,
  overwrite = TRUE
)
```

## Session info

```r
sessionInfo()
```
